info.name: Scholiq Integration Tests
info.description: Integration test collection for the scholiq Nextcloud app. One folder per capability spec (14 folders) covering the 19 critical-priority user stories captured in `intelligence-db.user_stories` (app_id=scholiq, priority=critical). All requests are TDD stubs — they assert the contract the implementation must satisfy. They will fail until the corresponding endpoints land. Folder order follows the Scholiq wedge plan: Phase 1 (course-management, enrolment, certification, compliance-audit), then dashboard + shell, then assessment surfaces, then NL-gatekeeper integrations and identity federation.

request.description: Verify Nextcloud is running.

item.name: dashboard
item.description: Capability spec: openspec/specs/dashboard/spec.md. Role-aware landing dashboards. No critical stories yet, but covered here because the wedge depends on the board compliance dashboard surface.

item.name: identity-federation
item.description: Capability spec: openspec/specs/identity-federation/spec.md. Underpins DigiD, eHerkenning, SURFconext, SchoolID + ECK iD pseudonymisation. The DigiD critical story (enrolment-digid-identification) is asserted from the enrolment folder; here we test the federation surface itself.

request.description: Tenant IdP chain: SURFconext, Studielink, DigiD, eHerkenning, user-saml. See openspec/specs/identity-federation/spec.md.
SchoolID + ECK iD pseudonymisation — BSN must never leave OpenConnector boundary. See openspec/specs/identity-federation/spec.md.
eHerkenning EH3 SSO entry for DUO Zakelijk. See openspec/specs/identity-federation/spec.md.
Returns the eduPersonAffiliation → Scholiq role map. See openspec/specs/identity-federation/spec.md.
